items.body_excerpt:
The Sparks have signed Kiana Williams. Here’s Sparks General Manager Raegan Pebley's statement on the move.

“We’re excited to add Kiana to our roster. She is a consummate professional whose work ethic, basketball IQ and passing ability will strengthen our group and add depth to our guard position.”

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Travis Mays. Texas PG was drafted 14th by SAC in 90. Started as a rook & had 14 ppg, made all-rookie team. Traded to ATL after 1 yr, hurt & played only 2 gms in 91-92. Played 1 more yr as backup before going abroad from 94-02. Coached SMU women thru 2016-21.
